shared_case_surface: bounded runs that keep meaningful steps, tool visibility, explicit state_delta notes, partial failure preservation, reviewable redaction, and markdown-summary boundaries inspectable on the same witness trace surface
bounded_replacement_rule: A local repo may replace the concrete cases only if it preserves the same witness-integrity question, keeps the public trace and summary jointly inspectable, and still covers visible tool use, explicit state_delta notes, partial-failure preservation, reviewable redaction, and markdown-summary overclaim pressure without turning the bundle into runtime-telemetry completeness or outcome grading.
public_safe_requirements: a bounded outside reviewer can inspect the public trace without hidden runtime-only telemetry
redaction protects sensitive payloads without erasing route reviewability
summary wording stays weaker than the visible trace rather than stronger
external effects remain visible as state_delta notes when they materially shaped the run
